She's more indelicate than you think, I make sure her being +12 is just symbolical, that should have guaranteed me the frenzy with her

Gdoll is even more bold, you can see inside the brain as it has been split. They took it up a notch
honestly the design of GDoll's brain is genius. Unironically.
not just the brain, the real doll features sell it

That it's been split into two hemispheres means the corpus callosum was severed. Anatomically that structure is responsible for cross-communication between the halves of the whole brain. Historically, in medical cases where its severance has been documented, the subjects therein were "prone to unusual behaviors," as though they were suddenly dealing with two separate patterns of thought at once. A good portion of them became erratic and unstable.
GDoll being the culmination of Doll's apathy towards humanity's fallacies and ineffectual efforts is displayed literally, prominently, dare I say even *focally* in her split brain.
All the genius, none of the connection.
also yes I love her doll features so much. I especially love that her nudity isn't sexualized. It's *artistic.*
this is pretty radical, reading in how her personality is driven, this is absolutely fantastic art direction into character writting orgasm
